title: Wise Owl perched on Tree Branch Coloring Page

seoDescription: Download and print this medium wise owl perched on tree branch coloring sheet. Ideal for kids and teens with balanced outlines, natural textures, and a beautiful scenic background. Free printable PDF.

funFacts: The Wise Owl perched on Tree Branch cannot rotate its eyes; instead, it can turn its head up to 270 degrees without injuring its neck.
The large facial discs of an Wise Owl perched on Tree Branch funnel sound waves directly to its ears, giving it incredible directional hearing.
